name: Pranil Belge
title: GenAI / AI Engineer
summary: Final-year Computer Engineering student (graduating June 2026) with hands-on experience in Generative AI, LLM API integration, Prompt Engineering, NLP, and Python-based ML workflows. Built AI-powered applications including an LLM-integrated civic-tech platform, a multi-turn ChatGPT API chatbot, and a GenAI-assisted analytics pipeline. Completed Google AI-ML and Altair Data Science virtual internships. Familiar with supervised learning, model evaluation, scikit-learn, RAG concepts, and AI product development. Eager to develop and deploy innovative generative AI solutions at Hexaware.

meta.title: Pranil Belge | GenAI Engineer Portfolio
meta.description: Explore GenAI / AI Engineer projects, Prompt Engineering showcases, and AI internships of Pranil Belge, specializing in LLMs, prompt designs, and RAG.

projects.title: Election Guide AI
projects.description: A civic-tech web application integrating the ChatGPT API for a conversational AI chatbot guiding users through India's election process, with voting eligibility checkers and timeline trackers.
achievements: Built a civic-tech web application integrating the ChatGPT API for a conversational AI chatbot guiding users through India’s election process.
Implemented voting eligibility checker, election timeline tracker, and AI-driven Q&A module for Hack2Skill BuildWithAI hackathon.
Designed prompt templates for consistent, context-aware responses, demonstrating practical NLP and prompt engineering.
projects.problemSolved: Voters lacked a consolidated, interactive Q&A assistant to check local eligibility, schedules, and policy stances.
projects.learnings: Acquired deep skills in handling streaming state variables, context-window compression, and system prompt framing.

projects.title: AI Chatbot using ChatGPT API
projects.description: A multi-turn conversational AI chatbot using the ChatGPT API with engineered prompt templates for context-aware dialogue management and rate-limit handling.
achievements: Built a multi-turn conversational AI chatbot using the ChatGPT API with engineered prompt templates for context-aware dialogue management.
Implemented conversation flow management, API integration, error handling, and rate-limit management.
projects.problemSolved: Standard chat endpoints default to single-turn responses; this project manages stateful multi-turn history with token optimization.
projects.learnings: Engineered production-ready code patterns for API error handling and rate-limit retry policies.

projects.title: Healthcare Risk Stratification System
projects.description: An ML patient classification model on 5,000+ records applying feature engineering and ROC-AUC evaluation to group chronic risk tiers.
achievements: Developed an ML-based patient risk classification model on 5,000+ records.
Applied feature engineering and ROC-AUC evaluation to stratify risk tiers, automating anomaly detection to reduce manual check overhead.
projects.problemSolved: Hospitals waste resources on reactive care; automated patient risk classification allows proactive outreach.
projects.learnings: Learned to evaluate feature importances and perform robust data validation before feeding ML model pipelines.

projects.title: Google Ads Campaign Diagnostic & Performance Analysis
projects.description: An end-to-end pipeline evaluating ad metrics (CTR, CPC, ROAS), automating anomaly scoring and cost performance diagnostics.
achievements: Built an end-to-end pipeline to evaluate Google Ads metrics and detect anomalies.
Optimised SQL queries for large dataset processing and surfaced root-cause insights efficiently.
projects.problemSolved: Campaign spend data is too complex to audit manually for anomalies.
projects.learnings: Acquired deep understanding of database schema joining and SQL performance tuning.

promptShowcase.name: Civic Election Advisor
promptShowcase.systemPrompt: You are a civic advisor chatbot. Provide neutral, factual information about elections. Keep answers concise. Do not express personal opinions.
promptShowcase.userInput: Am I eligible to vote if I am 17 years old but turning 18 next month?
promptShowcase.output: Under Indian election guidelines, you must be 18 years of age on or before the qualifying date (typically January 1st of the revision year) to register. If you turn 18 next month, you can pre-submit your registration form, but you will only be officially eligible to vote once registered after your 18th birthday.

promptShowcase.name: Chatbot Dialog Management Prompt
promptShowcase.systemPrompt: You are a stateful assistant. Summarize the user conversation history and extract their target action. Return a JSON structure.
promptShowcase.userInput: User: I need to refund my order. Assistant: What is the ID? User: It is order #5829.

workflows.title: Multi-turn Chatbot Session Flow
workflows.description: How the ChatGPT API manages stateful, context-aware user conversations.

steps.name: Message Ingestion
steps.detail: User submits text: 'My order #5829 hasn't arrived.'

steps.name: Context Retrieval
steps.detail: Retrieves the previous 4 chat history turns from browser state.

steps.name: Prompt Formatting
steps.detail: Merges system prompts, chat history, and the new query into a single array payload.

steps.name: API Dispatch
steps.detail: Sends payload to OpenAI/ChatGPT endpoint with error catching and retry limits.

steps.name: Response Stream
steps.detail: Parses chunk elements dynamically to render typewriter feedback.

workflows.title: ML Pipeline Training Workflow
workflows.description: How clinical EHR datasets are validated and fed into classifier models.

steps.name: Data Ingestion
steps.detail: Loads 5,000+ EHR records via Pandas from local database.

steps.name: Anomaly Check
steps.detail: Automated data validation flags null values and formats age/risk columns.

steps.name: Feature Engineering
steps.detail: One-hot encodes categorical values and normalizes numerical measurements.

steps.name: Model Training
steps.detail: Trains an ML classifier in scikit-learn using train-test splits.

steps.name: Evaluation
steps.detail: Logs ROC-AUC, precision, recall scores, and plots confusion matrix.
